description: Recto: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. Likely addressed to Avraham Maimonides. "... from Yemen to Qūṣ, and they said there the same thing that Sayyidnā (may his name be eternal) said. They said this to him and denied (what he said?) strenuously and led him to the path of truth... they are preventing him from traveling on account of his legal opponents..."
